title: Sunaptea rynchocarpa
taxonomy: Sunaptea rynchocarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to Australia. The classification of Sunaptea rynchocarpa includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Magnoliophyta. Further classification places it in the class Magnoliopsida and the order Lamiales. At the family level, it is classified as Gesneriaceae.
